evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Follow system design and architectural best practices and closely collaborate with cross-functional stakeholders to ensure data integrity and efficiency across all processes
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Following architectural best practices to ensure data integrity across processes is governance-oriented language emphasizing correctness over shipping speed, supporting rigour.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Serving long-term business needs without any regulatory or financial-reporting language points to business-decision stakes rather than compliance stakes, matching moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: We operate across four product verticals — Ride-Hailing, Delivery (Bolt Food and Bolt Market), Rentals (e-bikes, scooters, and carsharing), and Bolt Business — plus two horizontals: Platform and Incentives
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Operating across four product verticals plus two horizontal functions describes a large, well-established, specialized organization, consistent with a mature data team.
evidence.jd_authorship: Develop strategic data products such as segmentation feature store or enable advanced solutions such as interactive metrics trees
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Naming strategic data products like a segmentation feature store alongside more generic phrasing shows a blend of specific hiring-manager detail and boilerplate, matching mixed authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: You own everything between data producers and data consumers
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Owning everything between data producers and data consumers frames the role around serving internal data flows and other internal teams rather than one external function.
evidence.autonomy_level: Work closely with product analysts and adjacent stakeholders to prioritize and align analytics engineering roadmaps
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Working closely with product analysts to prioritize and align roadmaps combines direction-setting (prioritization) with collaborative execution, matching a mixed autonomy level.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Build, expand and maintain reusable data models and metrics in dbt
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Building, expanding, and maintaining reusable data models and metrics combines new construction with extension and upkeep of existing assets, matching mixed.
evidence.work_arrangement: hybrid model, including at least 12 monthly in-office days
evidence.ai_role: At Bolt, using AI daily is a baseline expectation for everyone. If there's a faster, smarter way to do your work, we expect you to find it.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Daily use of AI tools to accelerate one's own work is stated as a baseline expectation for the candidate, which is the ai_user pattern rather than the previously recorded 'none'.
evidence.testing_framing: ensure data integrity and efficiency across all processes
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data integrity mentioned but no explicit quality/testing ownership or data contracts responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Delivery-focused framing without compliance, regulatory, incident, or SLO-driven risk language.
